title: Decision Clarity Kit
description: Updates and resources for Decision Clarity Kit, a printable PDF and Markdown decision workbook.

items.title: Free Option Scorecard Tool
items.summary: Compare options with weighted scores, identify a leading option, and export a Markdown scorecard.

items.title: Decision Matrix Template
items.summary: A copyable matrix for comparing options by impact, effort, risk, reversibility, confidence, and next action.

items.title: Go/No-Go Decision Template
items.summary: A template for deciding whether to proceed, pause, or reduce risk before a threshold commitment.

items.title: Pros and Cons Template
items.summary: A practical pros-and-cons structure that ends with a decision, risk, next action, and review date.

items.title: Public Launch Issue
items.summary: Public GitHub issue with product context, sample links, use cases, checkout status, and boundaries.

items.title: Buy Decision Clarity Kit
items.summary: The $9 digital workbook is prepared. Request checkout while the external payment page is being connected.

items.title: Free Decision Reset Tool
items.summary: Use the browser-only tool to create a local Markdown decision record.

items.title: Filled Decision Example
items.summary: See a vague decision loop turned into a structured decision record, risk, next action, and review date.

items.title: Decision Workbook for Solo Founders
items.summary: A use case page for founder decisions about products, pricing, projects, and growth tests.

items.title: Team Decision Log Template
items.summary: A lightweight decision log structure for recording context, owner, next action, and review date.
